title: [MESH-GAP][EPIC] Production cross-peer capability fabric completion
summary: Parent issue for converting the mesh roadmap primitives into a production-grade local+remote capability fabric.

title: [MESH-GAP][P0] Normalize branch state and verify mesh primitive baseline
summary: Choose canonical implementation branch, reconcile stale local state, and lock current primitive behavior with tests before new work.

title: [MESH-GAP][P1] Complete mesh config parity and explicit-selector enforcement policy
summary: Make generated config match runtime mesh policy fields and enforce explicit selectors for safety-sensitive operations.

title: [MESH-GAP][P1] Define typed capability catalog and route-explain backend contracts
summary: Create first-class executable capability catalog and route-explain contracts that UI/SDK can consume.

title: [MESH-GAP][P2] Implement aggregate local-plus-remote Tooling catalog and provider fanout
summary: Replace one-provider Tooling discovery with a catalog that includes local tools plus all authorized remote peer tools and blocked reasons.

title: [MESH-GAP][P2] Implement tool sharing policy and approval protocol for local and mesh tools
summary: Add configurable per-tool sharing and approval flow covering both internal/local tools and remote peer tools, including approve-all modes.

title: [MESH-GAP][P3] Integrate Orchestrator and SDK with capability catalog, aggregate tools, and approval interrupts
summary: Make model/tool binding and SDK APIs consume the aggregate catalog and route approval requests instead of direct one-provider Tooling calls.

title: [MESH-GAP][P3] Implement DB/RAG remote query, namespace catalog, export/import policy, and provenance
summary: Move DB/RAG beyond policy docs by adding explicit query/export/import/provenance contracts and enforcement.

title: [MESH-GAP][P3] Harden audio/STT/TTS mesh boundaries with explicit session consent and event streaming
summary: Keep batch audio operations shareable while gating live mic/wakeword/streaming/playback behind explicit target, consent, indicators, and event contracts.

title: [MESH-GAP][P3] Implement scheduler delegation plus Auth/Config admin boundary hardening
summary: Make remote scheduler ownership explicit and keep Auth/Config as admin surfaces, not transparent mesh services.

title: [MESH-GAP][P4] Add unified mesh events, audit views, diagnostics, and support bundles
summary: Make capability, route, approval, audio, and data changes observable to UI/SDK and operators.

title: [MESH-GAP][P4] Build production two-peer E2E harness for mesh capability fabric
summary: Prove the full production flow with two peers across pairing, catalog, approvals, tools, data, audio, scheduler, Auth/Config boundaries, and UI/SDK events.
depends_on: MESH-GAP-004, MESH-GAP-005, MESH-GAP-006, MESH-GAP-007, MESH-GAP-008, MESH-GAP-009, MESH-GAP-010

title: [MESH-GAP][P5] Refresh UI/SDK task specs for mesh capability catalog and approval flows
summary: Update existing UI production tasks so they depend on the new mesh-gap contracts and include approval UI for local and remote tools.
